scenario: You are near the Blok M shopping area and want to reach the hotel district around Bundaran HI. Use the route helper on your phone.
expectedGoal: Receive a direct line 1 instruction with boarding and alighting places and direction toward Kota.
completionCriteria: Selects origin and destination without being told a stop ID

scenario: You are staying in Menteng and want to visit Grand Indonesia. Choose the area, then pick a sensible nearby transit boarding place if asked.
expectedGoal: Recognize both places, show nearby transit choices with geographic distance only, and produce a usable bus guide.
completionCriteria: Finds Menteng and Grand Indonesia without stop names supplied
Understands nearby choices are not walking directions
Completes a guide or clearly edits a boarding choice

scenario: Plan a trip from the Ragunan zoo area to Harmoni using only the on-screen helper.
expectedGoal: Follow a transfer journey and can restate each board/alight/transfer action.
completionCriteria: Does not invent wait or walk minutes

scenario: Search for Cawang as a destination from Blok M. Several similarly named results may appear.
expectedGoal: Use locality/type context to pick the intended Cawang transit place or area.
completionCriteria: Sees more than one contextualized result or clear disambiguation cues
Selects a stable result without asking for a stop code
Can reverse origin and destination afterward

scenario: Choose Bandara Soekarno-Hatta as origin and Blok M as destination. The place should be recognized even if no bus guide is available.
expectedGoal: Keep both places visible, understand coverage failed, and edit an endpoint.
completionCriteria: Product explains no bus route rather than hiding the place
Can change either endpoint without clearing both

scenario: With the map closed, go from Cawang to Grogol and confirm whether 9 or 9A is acceptable for the same ride.
expectedGoal: Complete guidance without opening the map and interpret a single ride step as take 9 or 9A.
completionCriteria: Completes the task without opening the map
Sees one ride step with both line options
Can state boarding place, alighting place, and that either listed line works
